name: orquestra
description: Solana IDL to REST API Converter - Upload an IDL, get a REST API instantly
author: orquestra contributors

scripts.build: cd packages/shared && bun run build && cd ../frontend && bun run build && cd ../worker && bun run build
scripts.deploy: bun run build && wrangler deploy --env production && wrangler pages deploy packages/frontend/dist --project-name orquestra-frontend --branch main
scripts.deploy:worker: bun run build:worker && wrangler deploy --env production
scripts.deploy:pages: bun run build:frontend && wrangler pages deploy packages/frontend/dist --project-name orquestra-frontend
scripts.type-check: tsc --noEmit -p packages/shared/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/worker/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/frontend/tsconfig.json
scripts.db:migrate:dev: wrangler d1 execute DB --local --file ./migrations/001_initial_schema.sql && wrangler d1 execute DB --local --file ./migrations/002_indexes.sql
scripts.db:reset: wrangler d1 execute DB --local --command "DROP TABLE IF EXISTS project_socials; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS api_keys; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS idl_versions; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS projects; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS users;"
